original_filename: Fire Risk Assessment - In House V2.0FEB24.docx

questions.question_text: Electrical equipment — Equipment used according to manufacturer's instructions. Maintenance and servicing were carried out as recommended. Regular visual inspections and portable appliance testing.
Flammable materials — Flammable materials are stored as the manufacturer recommends and away from ignition sources. Separate storage area for flammable materials.

Cigarettes — The smoking ban is in place and has reduced the hazards associated with smoking. If an external smoking area is provided, ensure there is a safe and suitable means for disposing of matches and cigarettes.
Building and maintenance work — Separate area for storage. Accumulation of rubbish avoided. The site is regularly cleaned and maintained.
Emergency plan — All staff know what to do if there is a fire and to ensure safe evacuation.

title: Fire Risk Assessment - In House V2.0FEB24
